intro: The technology sector was a primary target in a concentrated wave of zero-day exploitation from April 12-19, 2026, with 24 articles detailing the activity. The threat actors Chaotic Eclipse and Interlock were observed leveraging vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-34621 (CVSS 8.6), CVE-2026-32183 (CVSS 7.5), and CVE-2026-32201 (CVSS 6.5), alongside older CVEs like CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412. Attacks spanned the cryptocurrency, enterprise, government, and healthcare sectors, with a global footprint and notable focus on Kyrgyzstan. The severity of these incidents was pronounced, with 12 rated critical and 11 high among the documented cases.
